name: Orchestrator Config
description: Singleton config record for the deployed engine. Stores run status, safety thresholds, notification settings, and post-deploy registration flags. Only one record should exist (config_key = 'default').

properties.description: Current engine status. Set to 'paused' to stop all dispatch.
Why the engine is paused. Human-readable.
Who or what paused the engine: 'system', 'admin', 'claude-code'.
Consecutive error count since last successful run. Resets on success.
Auto-pause when error_count reaches this value. Default: 5.
User-configured outbound webhook URL for receiving notifications (Zapier, Slack, etc.).
Only send notifications at or above this severity. Default: warning.
ID of the last successfully processed Personize event. Used for polling fallback.
When the engine last polled for missed events.
True after setup:webhooks has run successfully.
True after setup:mcps has run successfully.
Last time any config property was changed.
